title: 2 Pack Bug Zapper Electric Fly Swatter Zapper - Indoor Outdoor Zapping Racket for Pest Control - Safe to Touch with 3-Layer Safety Mesh
bullet_points: KILLS RIGHT AWAY - The 2600 volt net kills flies, mosquitoes and other large insects right away. Reliable and effective electrical components.

SAFE TO TOUCH - Durable nickel-plated stainless steel 3-layer net and an inner layer of aluminum mesh allow for safe use. Safety trigger design combined with safety net prevents accidental electric shock.

Environmentally friendly: Conventional insecticides, such as sprays and insecticide strips, are toxic and not suitable for use around children and pets. This insecticide does not use toxic chemicals or sprays that can harm your home.

Compact Size & Convenient Design - With dimensions of 17 x 6.8 x 1 inches, this fly swatter can be easily stored and stored away when not in use. Its polymer construction is lightweight and durable and can withstand even the toughest loads. This electric fly swatter uses 2 AA batteries (not included), so no long charging times or heavy internal batteries are required.

INDOOR & OUTDOOR APPLICATIONS - This electric fly swatter can be used in all possible environments. Get rid of everything from fruit flies in the kitchen to mosquitoes on your next camping trip. With this device in hand, insect swarms will no longer be a problem.
